description: Source weights for the canonical blend (KTC + IDPTradeCalc + DLF IDP + DLF SF + Dynasty Nerds SF-TEP + FantasyPros SF + FantasyPros IDP + Dynasty Daddy SF + Flock Fantasy SF + FootballGuys SF + FootballGuys IDP + Yahoo / Justin Boone).

weight_rationale.KTC: Primary crowdsourced offense market source with the largest player pool.
weight_rationale.IDPTRADECALC: Primary IDP value source covering both offense and IDP players. Backbone for IDP ladder translation.
weight_rationale.DLF_IDP: DLF Dynasty League Football full-board IDP expert consensus (185 players, DL/LB/DB together). Rank-based signal, blended via coverage-aware mean.
weight_rationale.FANTASYPROS_SF: FantasyPros Dynasty Superflex offense expert consensus. Rank-based signal (~250 QB/RB/WR/TE players).
weight_rationale.DYNASTY_DADDY_SF: Dynasty Daddy Superflex crowd-sourced trade values via JSON API. Value-based signal (~320 QB/RB/WR/TE players). Standard SF — no TE premium.
weight_rationale.FLOCK_FANTASY_SF: Flock Fantasy Superflex expert consensus averaged ranks via JSON API. Rank-based signal (~370 QB/RB/WR/TE players). Standard SF — no TE premium.
weight_rationale.FOOTBALLGUYS_SF: FootballGuys Dynasty Rankings — offense half (QB/RB/WR/TE) of the user-managed PDF export, 6-expert consensus. Rank-based signal (~540 players).
weight_rationale.FOOTBALLGUYS_IDP: FootballGuys Dynasty Rankings — IDP half (DE/DT/LB/CB/S) of the same PDF export, 3-expert consensus. Rank-based signal (~400 players), translates through the shared-market IDP ladder.
weight_rationale.YAHOO_BOONE: Justin Boone's monthly Yahoo dynasty trade value charts (QB/RB/WR/TE). Rank-based signal combining the 2QB QB column with the TE-premium TE column — natively sized to our Superflex + TEP league. ~500 players.

how_to_tune: Edit the 'sources' values below. Higher = more influence. Set to 0 to exclude. Changes take effect on the next live contract rebuild (next scheduled scrape or manual /api/scrape).
